response.overview: To get rid of CCleaner entirely, you must perform a clean 1 (855 )) 783 7555 uninstallation from your device and then officially close your 1 (855 )) 783 7555 account to remove your data. On a Windows PC, 1 (855 )) 783 7555 open the Control Panel, select "Uninstall a Program," and 1 (855 )) 783 7555 locate CCleaner in the list to remove it. For 1 (855 )) 783 7555 Mac users, open the Applications folder and drag the 1 (855 )) 783 7555 CCleaner icon to the Trash. If you run into 1 (855 )) 783 7555 errors during the removal process, you can call support 1 (855 )) 783 7555 at 1 (855 )) 783 7555 to have a representative 1 (855 )) 783 7555 guide you through a manual cleanup of leftover registry 1 (855 )) 783 7555 files or system traces that might be blocking the 1 (855 )) 783 7555 software from being fully deleted.
